chapters.title: Sunday Invitation
chapters.content: Every Sunday, Olivia’s family meets for dinner at her grandmother’s house. Everyone brings something to share, and the table is always full.

chapters.title: Grandma’s Kitchen
chapters.content: Her grandmother prepares the main dish with care and tells old family stories while cooking. The smell of fresh food fills the entire house.

chapters.title: Laughter at the Table
chapters.content: Dinner lasts for hours because everyone talks, laughs, and remembers old moments together. It is Olivia’s favorite part of the week.
